roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PC 1538,5 - FILED

/CAL: SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 79 D/CTS:79/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/WS/WEAP/WEAP2/RESTR/X: ON 04-06-22, AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION,THE DEFENDANT  ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM COURT NO, 20008557 MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OFTHE SENTENCE IN THIS MATTER,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO PROBATION/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:  1//FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:05-04-22/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/EMTERM//CONTD: SENTENCING AND RECEIPT OF PSR/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 02-02-22 (10),03-04-22 (30), 03-21-22 (60)/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALLBE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS INPLACE,/WEAP/WS/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES- WORK/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
